title: A Small Star #94
author: W.B. Yeats
english: At dawn, windows remember dreams. The road is quiet after rain.
chinese: 黎明时，窗子记得梦。 雨后的小路安静下来。

title: The Lake Isle of Innisfree
author: W.B. Yeats
english: I will arise and go now, and go to Innisfree, And a small cabin build there, of clay and wattles made.
chinese: 我现在就动身，去茵纳斯弗利岛，在那里用泥土和枝条搭一座小房。

title: When You Are Old
author: W.B. Yeats
english: When you are old and grey and full of sleep, And nodding by the fire, take down this book.
chinese: 当你老了，头发花白，睡意沉沉，倦坐在炉边，取下这本书来。

title: The Second Coming
author: W.B. Yeats
english: Turning and turning in the widening gyre The falcon cannot hear the falconer;
chinese: 在不断扩大的旋涡里，猎鹰再也听不见驯鹰人的呼唤。

title: Sailing to Byzantium
author: W.B. Yeats
english: That is no country for old men. The young In one another's arms, birds in the trees
chinese: 那不是老年人的国度。青年人在互相拥抱；林中的鸟雀

title: Ode to the West Wind
author: Percy Bysshe Shelley
english: O Wild West Wind, thou breath of Autumn's being, Thou, from whose unseen presence the leaves dead
chinese: 哦，狂野的西风，秋之实体的气息！由于你无形无影的出现，万木萧疏

title: To a Skylark
author: Percy Bysshe Shelley
english: Hail to thee, blithe Spirit! Bird thou never wert, That from Heaven, or near it, Pourest thy full heart
chinese: 你好啊，欢乐的精灵！你似乎从不是飞禽，从天堂或天堂的邻近，以酣畅淋漓的乐音

title: Love's Philosophy
author: Percy Bysshe Shelley
english: The fountains mingle with the river, And the rivers with the ocean, The winds of heaven mix forever
chinese: 泉水汇入江河，江河注入海洋，天上的风永远混合着

title: Mutability
author: Percy Bysshe Shelley
english: We are as clouds that veil the midnight moon; How restlessly they speed, and gleam, and quiver
chinese: 我们恰似遮蔽午夜明月的云彩，疾驰、闪烁、颤动，永不停歇

title: Ozymandias
author: Percy Bysshe Shelley
english: I met a traveller from an antique land Who said: Two vast and trunkless legs of stone
chinese: 我遇见一位来自古国的旅人，他说：有两条巨大的石腿，半掩于沙漠之间

title: On First Looking into Chapman's Homer
author: John Keats
english: Much have I travell'd in the realms of gold, And many goodly states and kingdoms seen;
chinese: 我游历过许多黄金的国度，见过不少美好的城邦与王国

title: Ode to a Nightingale
author: John Keats
english: My heart aches, and a drowsy numbness pains My sense, as though of hemlock I had drunk
chinese: 我的心在痛，困顿和麻木刺进了感官，有如饮过毒鸠

title: Ode on a Grecian Urn
author: John Keats
english: Thou still unravish'd bride of quietness, Thou foster-child of silence and slow time
chinese: 你委身“寂静”的、完美的处子，受过了“沉默”和“悠久”的抚育

title: To Autumn
author: John Keats
english: Season of mists and mellow fruitfulness, Close bosom-friend of the maturing sun
chinese: 雾气洋溢、果实圆熟的秋，你和成熟的太阳成为友伴

title: Bright Star
author: John Keats
english: Bright star, would I were stedfast as thou art— Not in lone splendour hung aloft the night
chinese: 明亮的星！我祈求像你那样坚定——但我不愿意高悬夜空，独自辉映

title: The Road Not Taken
author: Robert Frost
english: Two roads diverged in a yellow wood, And sorry I could not travel both
chinese: 黄色的树林里分出两条路，可惜我不能同时去涉足

title: Stopping by Woods on a Snowy Evening
author: Robert Frost
english: Whose woods these are I think I know. His house is in the village though;
chinese: 这是谁的树林我想我知道，他的家就在村子那头

title: Fire and Ice
author: Robert Frost
english: Some say the world will end in fire, Some say in ice.
chinese: 有人说世界将毁灭于火，有人说，毁灭于冰。

title: Birches
author: Robert Frost
english: When I see birches bend to left and right Across the lines of straighter darker trees
chinese: 当我看到白桦树弯下身子，向左，也向右，在排列更直、颜色更深的树林间

title: Nothing Gold Can Stay
author: Robert Frost
english: Nature's first green is gold, Her hardest hue to hold.
chinese: 大自然的第一抹新绿是金，也是她最无力保留的颜色。

title: If You Forget Me
author: Pablo Neruda
english: I want you to know one thing. You know how this is:
chinese: 我要你知道一件事。你知道这是怎么回事：

title: Tonight I Can Write
author: Pablo Neruda
english: Tonight I can write the saddest lines. I loved her, and sometimes she loved me too.
chinese: 今夜我可以写下最哀伤的诗句。我爱她，她有时也爱我。

title: Ode to the Sea
author: Pablo Neruda
english: Sea, you alone are my poem, my unwritten poem, O vastness, O wildness, O endlessness
chinese: 大海，唯有你是我的诗，我未写成的诗，哦，浩瀚，哦，狂野，哦，无尽

title: Ode to My Socks
author: Pablo Neruda
english: Maru Mori brought me a pair of socks which she knitted herself
chinese: 马鲁·莫里给我带来一双袜子，是她亲手织的

title: The Song of the Despairing
author: Pablo Neruda
english: Despair is a black bird that flies over the sea, a bird without wings
chinese: 绝望是一只飞越海洋的黑鸟，一只没有翅膀的鸟

title: Song of Myself
author: Walt Whitman
english: I celebrate myself, and sing myself, And what I assume you shall assume
chinese: 我赞美我自己，歌唱我自己，我所承担的，你也将承担

title: I Hear America Singing
author: Walt Whitman
english: I hear America singing, the varied carols I hear, Those of mechanics, each one singing his as it should be blithe and strong
chinese: 我听见美国在歌唱，我听见各种各样的颂歌，机械工的歌，每个人都唱着他那快乐而强壮的歌

title: A Noiseless Patient Spider
author: Walt Whitman
english: A noiseless patient spider, I mark'd where on a little promontory it stood isolated
chinese: 一只沉默而耐心的蜘蛛，我注意到它孤立地站在小小的海角上

title: Out of the Cradle Endlessly Rocking
author: Walt Whitman
english: Out of the cradle endlessly rocking, Out of the mocking-bird's throat, the musical shuttle
chinese: 从永远摇摆的摇篮里，从知更鸟的喉咙里，音乐的梭子

title: When I Heard the Learn'd Astronomer
author: Walt Whitman
english: When I heard the learn'd astronomer, When the proofs, the figures, were ranged in columns before me
chinese: 当我聆听博学的天文学家演讲，当那些证明、数据，一排排地列在我面前

title: Because I Could Not Stop for Death
author: Emily Dickinson
english: Because I could not stop for Death, He kindly stopped for me;
chinese: 因为我不能停下来等待死神，他便好心地停下来接我。

title: I'm Nobody! Who are you?
author: Emily Dickinson
english: I'm Nobody! Who are you? Are you – Nobody – too?
chinese: 我是无名之辈！你是谁？你也是无名之辈吗？

title: Hope Is the Thing with Feathers
author: Emily Dickinson
english: Hope is the thing with feathers That perches in the soul
chinese: 希望是长着羽毛的小鸟，栖息在灵魂深处

title: There's a Certain Slant of Light
author: Emily Dickinson
english: There's a certain Slant of light, Winter Afternoons – That oppresses, like the Heft
chinese: 冬日的下午，有一种斜射的光，令人压抑，有如

title: I Dwell in Possibility
author: Emily Dickinson
english: I dwell in Possibility – A fairer House than Prose –
chinese: 我居住在可能性之中——一座比散文更美的房子——

title: The Panther
author: Rainer Maria Rilke
english: His vision, from the constantly passing bars, has grown so weary that it cannot hold anything else.
chinese: 它的目光被那走不完的铁栏，缠得这般疲倦，什么也不能收留。

title: Autumn Day
author: Rainer Maria Rilke
english: Lord, it is time. The summer was too long. Lay your shadow on the sundials
chinese: 主啊，是时候了。夏日曾经很盛大。把你的阴影落在日晷上

title: Duino Elegies
author: Rainer Maria Rilke
english: Who, if I cried out, would hear me among the angels' hierarchies?
chinese: 谁，在天使的序列中，听到我呼喊？

title: Letters to a Young Poet
author: Rainer Maria Rilke
english: You must love the questions themselves, like locked rooms and like books
chinese: 你要爱那些难题本身，就像爱那些锁闭的房间和书籍

title: The Unicorn
author: Rainer Maria Rilke
english: The unicorn is a myth, but it is also a fact, a fact of the heart
chinese: 独角兽是神话，但也是事实，是心灵的事实

title: Gitanjali
author: Rabindranath Tagore
english: Where the mind is without fear and the head is held high
chinese: 在那里，心是无畏的，头也抬得高昂

title: The Gardener
author: Rabindranath Tagore
english: Pluck this little flower and take it, delay not! I fear lest it droop and drop into the dust.
chinese: 摘下这朵小花，拿走吧，不要迟延！我怕它会枯萎，落入尘土。

title: Stray Birds
author: Rabindranath Tagore
english: Stray birds of summer come to my window to sing and fly away.
chinese: 夏天的飞鸟，飞到我的窗前唱歌，又飞去了。

title: The Crescent Moon
author: Rabindranath Tagore
english: I shall cross the sea of time, and reach the shore of the eternal.
chinese: 我将穿越时间之海，抵达永恒的彼岸。

title: Fruit-Gathering
author: Rabindranath Tagore
english: The night's flower was late but the morning flower came early.
chinese: 夜花迟开，晨花早放。

title: The Prophet
author: Kahlil Gibran
english: And think not you can direct the course of love, for love, if it finds you worthy, directs your course.
chinese: 不要以为你能指引爱的方向，因为爱，若发现你配得上，自会指引你的方向。

title: On Love
author: Kahlil Gibran
english: When love beckons to you, follow him, Though his ways are hard and steep.
chinese: 当爱向你招手时，跟随它，尽管它的道路艰难陡峭。

title: On Friendship
author: Kahlil Gibran
english: And a youth said, Speak to us of Friendship. And he answered, saying:
chinese: 一个青年说，请给我们谈谈友谊。他回答说：

title: On Children
author: Kahlil Gibran
english: Your children are not your children. They are the sons and daughters of Life's longing for itself.
chinese: 你的孩子，其实不是你的孩子。他们是生命渴望自身的儿女。

title: On Joy and Sorrow
author: Kahlil Gibran
english: Joy and sorrow are inseparable. Together they come and when one sits alone with you
chinese: 欢乐与悲伤不可分离。它们一同到来，当一个独自陪伴你时

title: The Love Song of J. Alfred Prufrock
author: T.S. Eliot
english: Let us go then, you and I, When the evening is spread out against the sky
chinese: 那么我们走吧，你和我，当夜晚在天边铺开

title: The Hollow Men
author: T.S. Eliot
english: We are the hollow men We are the stuffed men
chinese: 我们是空心人，我们是填塞起来的人

title: The Waste Land
author: T.S. Eliot
english: April is the cruellest month, breeding Lilacs out of the dead land
chinese: 四月是最残忍的月份，从死去的土地里培育出丁香

title: Four Quartets
author: T.S. Eliot
english: Time present and time past Are both perhaps present in time future
chinese: 现在的时间和过去的时间，也许都存在于未来的时间

title: Journey of the Magi
author: T.S. Eliot
english: A cold coming we had of it, Just the worst time of the year
chinese: 我们经历了一次寒冷的旅程，正是一年中最糟糕的时节

title: The Library of Babel
author: Jorge Luis Borges
english: The universe (which others call the Library) is composed of an indefinite, perhaps infinite number of hexagonal galleries.
chinese: 宇宙（别人称之为图书馆）由无数、或许无限的六角形回廊组成。

title: The Aleph
author: Jorge Luis Borges
english: In all that immense space, In books, in mirrors, in the labyrinths of memory
chinese: 在那浩瀚的空间里，在书中，在镜中，在记忆的迷宫里

title: The Garden of Forking Paths
author: Jorge Luis Borges
english: I leave to the various futures (not to all) my garden of forking paths.
chinese: 我把我那岔路纵横的花园留给各种未来（不是所有未来）。

title: The Circular Ruins
author: Jorge Luis Borges
english: No one saw him disembark in the unanimous night, no one saw the bamboo canoe sink into the sacred mud.
chinese: 没人看见他在漆黑的夜晚登岸，没人看见那只竹筏沉入神圣的泥沼。

title: The Secret Miracle
author: Jorge Luis Borges
english: The executioner raised his arm, and the world stopped.
chinese: 刽子手举起手臂，世界停止了。

title: The Raven
author: Edgar Allan Poe
english: Once upon a midnight dreary, while I pondered, weak and weary
chinese: 从前一个阴郁的子夜，我独自沉思，慵懒疲竭

title: Annabel Lee
author: Edgar Allan Poe
english: It was many and many a year ago, In a kingdom by the sea
chinese: 很久很久以前，在一个滨海的王国里

title: The Tell-Tale Heart
author: Edgar Allan Poe
english: True! – nervous – very, very dreadfully nervous I had been and am;
chinese: 真的！——紧张——我过去和现在都极度紧张；

title: A Dream Within a Dream
author: Edgar Allan Poe
english: Take this kiss upon the brow! And, in parting from you now
chinese: 在你额上印下这一吻！此刻与你分离

title: The Bells
author: Edgar Allan Poe
english: Hear the sledges with the bells – Silver bells!
chinese: 听那雪橇上的铃铛——银铃！

title: Do Not Go Gentle into That Good Night
author: Dylan Thomas
english: Do not go gentle into that good night, Old age should burn and rave at close of day;
chinese: 不要温和地走进那个良夜，老年应当在日暮时燃烧咆哮

title: And Death Shall Have No Dominion
author: Dylan Thomas
english: And death shall have no dominion. Dead men naked they shall be one
chinese: 死亡也并非是所向披靡。死去的人赤身裸体，他们将融为一体

title: Fern Hill
author: Dylan Thomas
english: Now as I was young and easy under the apple boughs
chinese: 我曾年轻自在，在苹果树枝下

title: In My Craft or Sullen Art
author: Dylan Thomas
english: In my craft or sullen art Exercised in the still night
chinese: 在我的手艺或沉郁的艺术中，在寂静的夜晚练习

title: The Force That Through the Green Fuse Drives the Flower
author: Dylan Thomas
english: The force that through the green fuse drives the flower Drives my green age;
chinese: 那通过绿色导火索催动花朵的力，也催动我绿色的年华

title: The Tiger
author: William Blake
english: Tiger Tiger, burning bright, In the forests of the night;
chinese: 老虎！老虎！黑夜的森林中，燃烧着煌煌的火光

title: The Lamb
author: William Blake
english: Little Lamb, who made thee? Dost thou know who made thee?
chinese: 小羊羔，谁造了你？你可知道谁造了你？

title: A Poison Tree
author: William Blake
english: I was angry with my friend: I told my wrath, my wrath did end.
chinese: 我对朋友发怒：我说出愤怒，愤怒便平息。

title: London
author: William Blake
english: I wander through each chartered street, Near where the chartered Thames does flow
chinese: 我走过每条特许的街道，在特许的泰晤士河流近旁

title: The Tyger
author: William Blake
english: What immortal hand or eye, Could frame thy fearful symmetry?
chinese: 是怎样的铁手、怎样的铁眼，能造出你那可怕的对称？

title: She Walks in Beauty
author: Lord Byron
english: She walks in beauty, like the night Of cloudless climes and starry skies;
chinese: 她走在美的光彩中，像夜晚，皎洁无云而且繁星满天

title: When We Two Parted
author: Lord Byron
english: When we two parted In silence and tears, Half broken-hearted
chinese: 想从前我们俩分手，默默无言地流着泪，心都碎了

title: So We'll Go No More A-Roving
author: Lord Byron
english: So, we'll go no more a-roving So late into the night, Though the heart be still as loving
chinese: 我们将不再漫游，深夜也不再，尽管心依旧充满爱意

title: The Destruction of Sennacherib
author: Lord Byron
english: The Assyrian came down like the wolf on the fold, And his cohorts were gleaming in purple and gold
chinese: 亚述人来了，像狼扑进羊群，他的队伍在紫金色中闪耀

title: Childe Harold's Pilgrimage
author: Lord Byron
english: There is a pleasure in the pathless woods, There is a rapture on the lonely shore
chinese: 无路的森林中自有乐趣，寂寞的海岸上自有狂喜

title: Kubla Khan
author: Samuel Taylor Coleridge
english: In Xanadu did Kubla Khan A stately pleasure-dome decree:
chinese: 忽必列汗在上都曾经，下令造一座堂皇的安乐殿堂：

title: The Rime of the Ancient Mariner
author: Samuel Taylor Coleridge
english: It is an ancient Mariner, And he stoppeth one of three.
chinese: 是一个年迈的水手，他拦住了三个行人中的一个。

title: Frost at Midnight
author: Samuel Taylor Coleridge
english: The Frost performs its secret ministry, Unhelped by any wind.
chinese: 寒霜在执行它秘密的使命，没有一丝风的帮助。

title: Dejection: An Ode
author: Samuel Taylor Coleridge
english: Well! They are gone, and here must I remain, This lime-tree bower my prison!
chinese: 好吧！他们走了，我却必须留在这里，这椴树凉亭就是我的监狱！

title: Christabel
author: Samuel Taylor Coleridge
english: Is the night chilly and dark? The night is chilly, but not dark.
chinese: 夜晚寒冷而黑暗吗？夜晚寒冷，但并不黑暗。

title: The World Is Too Much With Us
author: William Wordsworth
english: The world is too much with us; late and soon, Getting and spending, we lay waste our powers;
chinese: 世事对我们太过分；无论早晚，我们获取和消费，耗尽了我们的力量

title: I Wandered Lonely as a Cloud
author: William Wordsworth
english: I wandered lonely as a cloud That floats on high o'er vales and hills
chinese: 我孤独地漫游，像一朵云，在山丘和谷地上飘荡

title: Composed Upon Westminster Bridge
author: William Wordsworth
english: Earth has not anything to show more fair: Dull would he be of soul who could pass by
chinese: 大地再没有比这儿更美的风光：凡能路过而不驻足的人，灵魂必是迟钝的

title: Lines Composed a Few Miles Above Tintern Abbey
author: William Wordsworth
english: Five years have past; five summers, with the length Of five long winters!
chinese: 五年过去了；五个夏天，还有五个漫长的冬天！

title: My Heart Leaps Up
author: William Wordsworth
english: My heart leaps up when I behold A rainbow in the sky:
chinese: 每当我看见天上的彩虹，我的心就会欢跳：

title: The Lady of Shalott
author: Alfred Tennyson
english: On either side the river lie Long fields of barley and of rye
chinese: 河的两岸，大片的大麦和黑麦田，一直延伸到远方

title: Break, Break, Break
author: Alfred Tennyson
english: Break, break, break, On thy cold gray stones, O Sea!
chinese: 冲吧，冲吧，冲吧，大海啊，冲在你冰冷的灰色岩石上！

title: Ulysses
author: Alfred Tennyson
english: It little profits that an idle king, By this still hearth, among these barren crags
chinese: 一个闲散的国王，守着这寂静的炉火，在这些荒瘠的岩石间，毫无益处

title: In Memoriam A.H.H.
author: Alfred Tennyson
english: I hold it true, whate'er befall; I feel it, when I sorrow most;
chinese: 无论发生什么，我都坚信；在我最悲伤的时候，我感受到了

title: The Charge of the Light Brigade
author: Alfred Tennyson
english: Half a league, half a league, Half a league onward, All in the valley of Death
chinese: 半里格，半里格，半里格向前，全都冲进死亡之谷

title: The Hound of Heaven
author: Francis Thompson
english: I fled Him, down the nights and down the days; I fled Him, down the arches of the years;
chinese: 我逃避他，穿过一个个黑夜，一个个白昼；我逃避他，穿过岁月的拱门

title: The Wind on the Downs
author: Francis Thompson
english: The wind on the downs is a wild thing, A thing of the sky and the sea
chinese: 丘陵上的风是狂野的，是天空和大海的精灵

title: The Kingdom of God
author: Francis Thompson
english: The Kingdom of God is within you, And without you, And around you
chinese: 上帝的王国在你心中，在你之外，在你周围

title: The Poet
author: Francis Thompson
english: The poet is a seer, He sees the invisible, He hears the inaudible
chinese: 诗人是先知，他看见无形的，听见无声的

title: The Song of the Soul
author: Francis Thompson
english: My soul is a bird, It flies in the sky, It sings in the wind
chinese: 我的灵魂是一只鸟，它在天空飞翔，它在风中歌唱

title: The Darkling Thrush
author: Thomas Hardy
english: I leant upon a coppice gate When Frost was spectre-gray
chinese: 我倚在矮林的门边，当寒霜如幽灵般灰白

title: Afterwards
author: Thomas Hardy
english: When the Present has latched its postern behind my tremulous stay
chinese: 当现在在我颤抖的停留之后，闩上了它的后门

title: The Oxen
author: Thomas Hardy
english: Christmas Eve, and twelve of the clock. 'Now they are all on their knees,'
chinese: 圣诞夜，十二点整。‘现在他们全都跪下了，’

title: Neutral Tones
author: Thomas Hardy
english: We stood by a pond that winter day, And the sun was white, as though chidden of God
chinese: 冬日里，我们站在池塘边，太阳惨白，仿佛被上帝斥责

title: The Convergence of the Twain
author: Thomas Hardy
english: In a solitude of the sea Deep from human vanity
chinese: 在大海的孤寂中，远离人类的虚荣

title: The Soldier
author: Rupert Brooke
english: If I should die, think only this of me: That there's some corner of a foreign field
chinese: 如果我死去，你只需这样想：在异国的田野上，有一个角落

title: Grantchester
author: Rupert Brooke
english: The old Vicarage, how well I know it! The orchard where the pear-trees blow
chinese: 老牧师住宅，我多么熟悉！梨树在果园里摇曳

title: Peace
author: Rupert Brooke
english: Now, God be thanked Who has matched us with His hour
chinese: 现在，感谢上帝，让我们与他的时刻相配

title: The Dead
author: Rupert Brooke
english: Blow out, you bugles, over the rich Dead!
chinese: 吹吧，你们的号角，吹向富有的死者！

title: Day
author: Rupert Brooke
english: The day has come, the sun has risen, The birds have sung their song
chinese: 白天来临，太阳升起，鸟儿唱着它们的歌

title: The Love Song of J. Alfred Prufrock
author: T.S. Eliot
english: Let us go then, you and I, When the evening is spread out against the sky
chinese: 那么我们走吧，你和我，当夜晚在天边铺开

title: The Hollow Men
author: T.S. Eliot
english: We are the hollow men We are the stuffed men
chinese: 我们是空心人，我们是填塞起来的人

title: The Waste Land
author: T.S. Eliot
english: April is the cruellest month, breeding Lilacs out of the dead land
chinese: 四月是最残忍的月份，从死去的土地里培育出丁香

title: Four Quartets
author: T.S. Eliot
english: Time present and time past Are both perhaps present in time future
chinese: 现在的时间和过去的时间，也许都存在于未来的时间

title: Journey of the Magi
author: T.S. Eliot
english: A cold coming we had of it, Just the worst time of the year
chinese: 我们经历了一次寒冷的旅程，正是一年中最糟糕的时节

title: The Library of Babel
author: Jorge Luis Borges
english: The universe (which others call the Library) is composed of an indefinite, perhaps infinite number of hexagonal galleries.
chinese: 宇宙（别人称之为图书馆）由无数、或许无限的六角形回廊组成。

title: The Aleph
author: Jorge Luis Borges
english: In all that immense space, In books, in mirrors, in the labyrinths of memory
chinese: 在那浩瀚的空间里，在书中，在镜中，在记忆的迷宫里

title: The Garden of Forking Paths
author: Jorge Luis Borges
english: I leave to the various futures (not to all) my garden of forking paths.
chinese: 我把我那岔路纵横的花园留给各种未来（不是所有未来）。

title: The Circular Ruins
author: Jorge Luis Borges
english: No one saw him disembark in the unanimous night, no one saw the bamboo canoe sink into the sacred mud.
chinese: 没人看见他在漆黑的夜晚登岸，没人看见那只竹筏沉入神圣的泥沼。

title: The Secret Miracle
author: Jorge Luis Borges
english: The executioner raised his arm, and the world stopped.
chinese: 刽子手举起手臂，世界停止了。

title: The Raven
author: Edgar Allan Poe
english: Once upon a midnight dreary, while I pondered, weak and weary
chinese: 从前一个阴郁的子夜，我独自沉思，慵懒疲竭

title: Annabel Lee
author: Edgar Allan Poe
english: It was many and many a year ago, In a kingdom by the sea
chinese: 很久很久以前，在一个滨海的王国里

title: The Tell-Tale Heart
author: Edgar Allan Poe
english: True! – nervous – very, very dreadfully nervous I had been and am;
chinese: 真的！——紧张——我过去和现在都极度紧张；

title: A Dream Within a Dream
author: Edgar Allan Poe
english: Take this kiss upon the brow! And, in parting from you now
chinese: 在你额上印下这一吻！此刻与你分离

title: The Bells
author: Edgar Allan Poe
english: Hear the sledges with the bells – Silver bells!
chinese: 听那雪橇上的铃铛——银铃！
